data.name: BlockPropertyProperties_WaterLevel
data.value: Nutrient solution level:

data.name: BlockPropertyProperties_WaterUsage
data.value: Nutrient solution usage:

data.name: Description_Block_Composter
data.value: A block for converting organic material into nutrients.

data.name: Description_Block_HydroSolutionTankMini
data.value: A small, compact container for nutrient solution.

data.name: Description_Block_HydroSolutionTankMini_Fieldwork
data.value: A small, compact container for nutrient solution.

data.name: Description_Block_HydroSolutionTankSmall
data.value: A small container for nutrient solution, used in hydroponic systems.

data.name: Description_BlueprintClasses_Composting
data.value: Allow the conversion of organic material into nutrients for plant cultivation.

data.name: Description_ClangKola
data.value:
A sparkling refreshment that messes with your metabolism and makes any feeling of bloating disappear.
Water: ~15% Sleep: Gives a quick energy boost Fatigue: moderate Bloating: low

data.name: Description_CosmicCoffee
data.value:
The wake-up drink that launches you so far into the future you forget when you last slept.
Water: ~5% Sleep: Keeps you extremely awake Fatigue: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Fruit
data.value:
A delicious source of quick hunger and thirst. Perfect if your last meal was 200 years ago.
Food: ~6% Water: ~6% Bloating: minimal Recovery: minimal

data.name: Description_Grain
data.value: This grain is not suitable for direct consumption. It is just another step towards pleasure or death.

data.name: Description_InsectMeatCooked
data.value:
After careful preparation, this meat is no longer poisonous. Reminds you a bit of chicken. Or what you think of as chicken.
Health: ~20% Food: ~14%

data.name: Description_InsectMeatRaw
data.value:
Raw meat from a Sabiroid. Most people say it's not the food that kills you, but the taste.
Health: -40% Food: -30%

data.name: Description_IrrigationSystem
data.value: A vital system for your farm that processes hydro pellets to provide nutrient solution for your plants.

data.name: Description_Item_BioPaste
data.value: A nutritious and filling meal in a tube.

data.name: Description_Item_EmptyTinCan
data.value: An empty, reusable tin can, ideal for recycling or refilling.

data.name: Description_Item_FruitTea
data.value: A soothing, hot tea made from dried fruit.

data.name: Description_Item_InterBeer
data.value: A cool beer tasting of the stars, brewed with choice, hydroponic ingredients.

data.name: Description_Item_LiesChips
data.value: Chips with a uniquely salty flavor that's so good, they'll have you believing you're back home.

data.name: Description_Item_MycoBoost
data.value: A potent drink made from fungi that sharpens focus.

data.name: Description_Item_PrlnglesChips
data.value: A personal, crispy snack, ideal for the long, silent hours.

data.name: Description_Item_SparklingWater
data.value: Refreshing and revitalizing.

data.name: Description_MammalMeatCooked
data.value:
A rare treat that's worth the effort of the hunt. Better than that space stew you had last week.
Health: ~20% Food: ~14%

data.name: Description_MammalMeatRaw
data.value:
Raw meat from a mammal. Might be edible if you have a very strong stomach. And ignore the noises it makes while being digested.
Health: -40% Food: -30%

data.name: Description_Meal_BananaBeef
data.value:
A culinary aberration of fruit and meat. If it tastes good, it's good; if not, you didn't try it.
Health: ~10% Food: ~90% Water: ~6% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Burrito
data.value:
The perfect energy source for on the go. Comes in a practical, edible wrapper to prevent leftovers.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Chili
data.value:
A warming stew that reminds you of home. At least, until the last bite holds a fiery surprise.
Health: ~5% Food: ~48% Water: ~12.5% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_ClangCrunchies
data.value:
Crunchy, nutritious, but with a chaotic aftertaste. You live longer, but your body isn't happy about it.
Health: -20% Food: ~90% Fatigue: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Curry
data.value:
A warming stew that reminds you of exotic kitchens. Perfect for forgetting the cold of space for a while.
Health: ~5% Food: ~72% Water: ~18% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Dumplings
data.value:
A hearty meal for the lonely engineer. So filling that you forget for a while that you are 300,000 km away from home.
Health: ~5% Food: ~92% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_ExpiredSlop
data.value: It doesn't smell good, it doesn't look good, and it doesn't taste any better. But hey, the composter will be happy.

data.name: Description_Meal_Flatbread
data.value:
A simple, flat bread. You need water to wash it down, but it fills you up for the entire day.
Health: ~5% Food: ~64% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_FoodPaste
data.value:
A flavorless ration for survivors. It may not be delicious, but it gets the job done.
Food: ~30% Water: ~4.5% Bloating: minimal Can be consumed with helmet on.

data.name: Description_Meal_FrontierStew
data.value:
A hearty stew cooked from everything the outposts have to offer. A meal that fills the stomach and lifts morale.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Water: ~15% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_FruitBar
data.value:
A simple, fruity snack for on the go. The perfect combination of grain and sweetness to break up the monotony of space.
Food: ~28% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_FruitPastry
data.value:
A delicious, warm meal for in between. Perfect for forgetting the harsh reality of space for a second.
Health: ~5% Food: ~76% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_GardenSlaw
data.value:
A crunchy meal that almost seems healthy. Ideal for a diet consisting of monotony and surviving in space.
Food: ~28%

data.name: Description_Meal_GreenPellets
data.value:
A highly efficient, but bland meal. You don't need to know what's in it, as long as it fills you up.
Health: ~20% Food: ~91% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Hardtack
data.value:
A hardtack cracker that's harder than space itself. It fills your stomach, but only if you keep your teeth.
Health: -10% Food: ~15% Water: -4% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_KelpCrisp
data.value:
A simple, crispy snack made from algae. It fills the stomach, but that's about it.
Food: ~20% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Lasagna
data.value:
A hearty meal made of layers of pasta, vegetables, and meat. A true wonder of space cuisine.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Ramen
data.value:
A hot noodle soup that warms your insides. The perfect meal for a cold night in the cockpit.
Health: ~5% Food: ~60% Water: ~15% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_RedPellets
data.value:
A practical ration that fits in any spacesuit. It's not delicious, but you don't have to look at it when you eat it.
Food: ~31.5% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_SearedSabiroid
data.value:
An exotic dish, prepared from the largest of all Sabiroids. It tastes of revenge and a little bit of lemon.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Recovery: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Spaghetti
data.value:
A universal delicacy that is considered a standard comfort food in almost every universe. The sauce is a secret. Eat it fast before the sauce gets cold.
Health: ~5% Food: ~94.5% Water: ~8% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_SteakDinner
data.value:
A meal so exquisite you wonder if you truly deserve it. The best food in this quadrant of the galaxy.
Health: ~20% Food: ~98% Recovery: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_SynthLoaf
data.value:
An industrially manufactured loaf, perfectly tailored to the needs of a lonely engineer. With an expiration date longer than your life.
Health: ~10% Food: ~54% Water: ~10% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Meal_Unknown
data.value: An unknown meal found in space. You don't know what's in it, but it seems to work. Good, as long as it doesn't turn you into a monster.

data.name: Description_Meal_VeggieBurger
data.value:
A meat-free alternative for the engineer. So nutritious, you won't miss the proteins. At least, that's what we tell ourselves.
Health: ~5% Food: ~80% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Mushrooms
data.value:
A humble mushroom that grows in almost any climate. It's a solid food source and the basic building block for... other things.
Food: ~10% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Description_Vegetables
data.value:
A universal food source for a healthy diet. As long as you don't find any monsters on the planet, it's the best thing you can eat.
Food: ~15% Water: ~4.5%

data.name: DisplayName_Block_Composter
data.value: Composter

data.name: DisplayName_Block_HydroSolutionTankMini
data.value: Hydro Solution Tank (mini)

data.name: DisplayName_Block_HydroSolutionTankMini_Fieldwork
data.value: Hydro Solution Tank (mini)

data.name: DisplayName_Block_HydroSolutionTankSmall
data.value: Hydro Solution Tank (small)

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_BioPaste
data.value:
Bio-Paste
Food: ~5% Water: ~5% Bloating: high Can be consumed with helmet on.

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_Composting_Algae
data.value:
Composting Algae
Yield: 20 Organics Duration: 8 seconds

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_Composting_BioPaste
data.value:
Composting Bio-Paste
Yield: 60 Organics Duration: 80 seconds

Yield: 25 Organics Duration: 10 seconds

Yield: 12 Organics Duration: 18 seconds

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_Composting_MammalMeatRaw
data.value:
Composting Raw Mammal Meat
Yield: 25 Organics Duration: 15 seconds

data.value:

data.value:

data.value:

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_Composting_Meal_SteakDinner
data.value:

Yield: 137 Organics Duration: 60 seconds

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_Composting_Meal_VeggieBurger
data.value: Composting Veggie Burger Yield: 130 Organics Duration: 42 seconds

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_Composting_MealPack_BananaBeef

Yield: 37 Organics Duration: 28 seconds

data.value:
Mammal Meat (cooked)
Health: ~20% Food: ~14%

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_CookSpiderMeat
data.value:
Sabiroid Meat (cooked)
Health: ~20% Food: ~14%

data.value: Empty Can

data.name: DisplayName_BlueprintClasses_Composting
data.value: Composting

data.name: DisplayName_Item_BioPaste
data.value: Bio-Nutri-Paste

data.name: DisplayName_Item_EmptyTinCan
data.value: Empty Tin Can

data.name: DisplayName_Item_FruitTea
data.value: Fruit Tea

data.name: DisplayName_Item_HydroPellets
data.value: Nutrient Pellets

data.name: DisplayName_Item_InterBeer
data.value: Inter-Stella Beer

data.name: DisplayName_Item_LiesChips
data.value: Lies Chips

data.name: DisplayName_Item_MycoBoost
data.value: Myco-Boost

data.name: DisplayName_Item_Organic
data.value: Organic Material

data.name: DisplayName_Item_PrlnglesChips
data.value: Singles Chips

data.name: DisplayName_Item_SparklingWater
data.value: Sparkling Water

data.name: Item_Algae_Tooltip
data.value: A nutritious algae that serves as a building block for BioPaste and can be composted for organics.

data.name: Item_BioPaste_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A nutritious paste that gives you quick energy. Ideal for emergencies and for quick consumption.
Food: ~5% Water: ~5% Bloating: high Can be consumed with helmet on.

data.name: Item_ClangCola_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A sparkling drink that creates chaos in your metabolism. It keeps you awake but also makes you restless.
Water: ~15% Sleep: Gives a quick energy boost Fatigue: moderate Bloating: low (reduces)

data.name: Item_CosmicCoffee_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
The ultimate pick-me-up. It keeps you extremely awake, but also leads to sleep deprivation.
Water: ~5% Sleep: Keeps you extremely awake Fatigue: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_Fruit_Tooltip
data.value:
A nutritious, water-rich fruit. Better than nothing and good for morale.
Food: ~6% Water: ~6%

data.name: Item_FruitTea_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A soothing, warm tea that calms the stomach and relaxes you.
Water: ~20% Makes one tired Reduces bloating

data.name: Item_Grain_Tooltip
data.value: A staple for many dishes. It cannot be eaten raw.

data.name: Item_InsectMeatCooked_Tooltip
data.value:
A simple, cooked snack. Satisfies hunger and is a good protein source, without any side effects.
Health: ~20% Food: ~14%

data.name: Item_InsectMeatRaw_Tooltip
data.value: Raw meat, not suitable for direct consumption. The consequences are usually fatal.

data.name: Item_InterBeer_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A beer brewed between the stars. The perfect way to end a long day and enjoy life.
Health: ~15% Water: ~75% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_LiesChips_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
The ultimate snack for on the go. It not only satisfies hunger, but also awakens a longing for home.
Health: ~3% Sleep: Makes you tired Food: ~15% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MammalMeatCooked_Tooltip
data.value:
A rare treat that strengthens the body. Satisfies hunger and is worth the effort.
Health: ~20% Food: ~14%

data.name: Item_MammalMeatRaw_Tooltip
data.value: Raw meat, not suitable for direct consumption. It will make your body sick.

data.name: Item_MealPack_BananaBeef_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A culinary aberration of fruit and meat. It fills the stomach, heals wounds, and quenches thirst.
Health: ~10% Food: ~90% Water: ~6% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Burrito_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
The perfect energy source for on the go. Comes in a practical, edible wrapper to prevent leftovers.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Chili_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A warming stew that reminds you of home. It fills your stomach, quenches thirst, and gives you strength.
Health: ~5% Food: ~48% Water: ~12.5% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_ClangCrunchies_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A crunchy, nutritious snack with side effects. You live longer, but not happier.
Health: -20% Food: ~90% Fatigue: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Curry_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A spicy, warming stew that reminds you of foreign kitchens. Ideal for forgetting the cold of space.
Health: ~5% Food: ~72% Water: ~18% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Dumplings_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A hearty meal. Fills the stomach, gives you energy, and is easy to digest.
Health: ~5% Food: ~92% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_ExpiredSlop_Extra_Tooltip
data.value: The stench and consistency speak for themselves. Only for composting - not for consumption.

data.name: Item_MealPack_Flatbread_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A simple, flat bread. Satisfies hunger and is a good base for any meal.
Health: ~5% Food: ~64% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_FoodPaste_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A flavorless ration for emergencies. It may not be delicious, but it gets the job done.
Food: ~30% Water: ~4.5% Bloating: minimal Can be consumed with helmet on.

data.name: Item_MealPack_FrontierStew_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A hearty stew. Fills the stomach, quenches thirst and heals your wounds.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Water: ~15% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_FruitBar_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A simple, fruity snack for in between. Satisfies hunger and is easy to digest.
Food: ~28% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_FruitPastry_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A warm, sweet meal for in between. Satisfies hunger and gives you the necessary strength to continue.
Health: ~5% Food: ~76% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_GardenSlaw_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A crunchy, refreshing meal. It satisfies hunger, but without overfilling you.
Food: ~28%

data.name: Item_MealPack_GreenPellets_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A highly efficient, but bland meal. It fills you up and strengthens your body.
Health: ~20% Food: ~91% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Hardtack_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A hardtack cracker so hard it knocks out your teeth. Useful when you're hungry.
Health: -10% Food: ~15% Water: -4% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_KelpCrisp_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A simple, crispy snack made from algae. It fills the stomach, but that's about it.
Food: ~20% Bloating: high

data.name: Item_MealPack_Lasagna_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A hearty meal. Fills the stomach, heals your wounds, and gives you strength.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Ramen_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A hot noodle soup. It fills the stomach, quenches thirst, and warms the soul.
Health: ~5% Food: ~60% Water: ~15% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_RedPellets_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A practical, nutritious ration. It may not be delicious, but it fills you up.
Food: ~31.5% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_SearedSabiroid_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
An exotic dish that fills the stomach and strengthens the body. A true pleasure for the palate.
Health: ~20% Food: ~94.5% Recovery: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Spaghetti_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A universal delicacy. Fills the stomach and warms the soul on a cold evening.
Health: ~5% Food: ~94.5% Water: ~8% Recovery: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_SteakDinner_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A nutritious meal that leaves no wishes unfulfilled. The best food you can find in this quadrant of the galaxy.
Health: ~20% Food: ~98% Recovery: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_SynthLoaf_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
An industrially manufactured loaf, ideal for long-term storage. It is nutritious, easy to store, and simple to eat.
Health: ~10% Food: ~54% Water: ~10% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MealPack_Unknown_Extra_Tooltip
data.value: An unknown meal, found in space. It is powerful, but its origin is unknown.

data.name: Item_MealPack_VeggieBurger_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A meat-free meal. So nutritious, you won't miss the proteins.
Health: ~5% Food: ~80% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_Mushrooms_Tooltip
data.value:
A nutritious mushroom that is the basis for many useful recipes. Better than what you find in the swamp.
Food: ~10% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_MycoBoost_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
A pick-me-up made from mushrooms. Provides mental clarity and keeps you awake, but also increases sleep deprivation.
Water: ~15% Sleep: Keeps you awake Fatigue: moderate Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_PrlnglesChips_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
The ultimate salty snack that satisfies the infinite craving for chips. Can cause side effects like fatigue.
Health: ~6% Food: ~30% Bloating: moderate

data.name: Item_SparklingWater_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
Refreshing sparkling water. It quenches thirst and revitalizes the mind.
Water: ~25%

data.name: Item_Vegetables_Tooltip
data.value:
A nutritious source of vitamins and nutrients. Better than nothing.
Food: ~15% Water: ~4.5%

data.name: NW_Effect_already_active
data.value: A similar effect is already active.

data.name: NW_Helmet_NOT_Open_To_Eat
data.value: This item requires an oxygenated environment.

data.name: NW_Helmet_Open_To_Eat
data.value: Helmet open to eat/drink

data.name: NW_NO_Consumeables_in_Bed
data.value: Your parents told ya... not in bed.

data.name: NW_NO_Consumeables_in_Stasis
data.value: You can't use this in a cryochamber ...

data.name: UI_Bloating_Vomit_Message
data.value: Your stomach has had enough of all that slop. You have to vomit.

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_00
data.value: Bloating:

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_10
data.value: Bloating: Slight

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_30
data.value: Bloating: Moderate

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_50
data.value: Bloating: Severe

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_70
data.value: Bloating: Critical

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_90
data.value: Bloating: Nauseous

data.name: UI_BloatingLabel_na
data.value: Bloating: -1

data.name: UI_BloatingTooltip_00
data.value: Your stomach is empty and ready for food.

data.name: UI_BloatingTooltip_10
data.value: You've had a little to eat, but your stomach is still mostly empty.

data.name: UI_BloatingTooltip_30
data.value: You're full, but there's still some room.

data.name: UI_BloatingTooltip_50
data.value: You've had enough to eat. Your stomach feels full.

data.name: UI_BloatingTooltip_70
data.value: You've eaten too much. Your stomach feels heavy and distended.

data.name: UI_BloatingTooltip_90
data.value: You have severe stomach pain. Your stomach feels like it's about to burst.

data.name: UI_Button_Close
data.value: Close

data.name: UI_consumableChain_Header_Text
data.value: Things you last ate

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_00
data.value: Fatigue:

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_100
data.value: Fatigue: Severe

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_140
data.value: Fatigue: Critical

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_180
data.value: Fatigue: Collapse

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_20
data.value: Fatigue: Slight

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_60
data.value: Fatigue: Moderate

data.name: UI_FatigueLabel_na
data.value: Fatigue: -1

data.name: UI_FatigueTooltip_00
data.value: You're at the peak of your performance, and your mind is working without limitations.

data.name: UI_FatigueTooltip_100
data.value: Your body is rebelling against the chemical overexertion. Your thoughts are racing but aimless.

data.name: UI_FatigueTooltip_140
data.value: The effects of the substances are overwhelming. You're experiencing sensory distortions and hallucinations.

data.name: UI_FatigueTooltip_180
data.value: Your body and mind can no longer handle the overexertion. You lose consciousness.

data.name: UI_FatigueTooltip_20
data.value: A mild discomfort is setting in. You feel a subtle but noticeable pressure on your mind.

data.name: UI_FatigueTooltip_60
data.value: Your body is tense. You feel restless and jittery. Concentrating is becoming difficult.

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_00
data.value: Food: Starving

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_10
data.value: Food: Famished

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_30
data.value: Food: Very hungry

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_50
data.value: Food: Hungry

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_70
data.value: Food: Sated

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_90
data.value: Food: Stuffed

data.name: UI_FoodLabel_na
data.value: Food: -1

data.name: UI_FoodTooltip_00
data.value: Your body is running on its last reserves. You're on the verge of collapse.

data.name: UI_FoodTooltip_10
data.value: You feel weak and listless. Your stomach aches, and you can't focus.

data.name: UI_FoodTooltip_30
data.value: Your stomach is rumbling. You feel restless, and your concentration is slipping.

data.name: UI_FoodTooltip_50
data.value: You have an appetite. It's time to eat to stay energized.

data.name: UI_FoodTooltip_70
data.value: Your stomach is full. You have enough energy for your current tasks.

data.name: UI_FoodTooltip_90
data.value: You feel comfortable, fortified, and full of energy.

data.name: UI_Header_Text
data.value: APEX.Advanced! (en)

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_00
data.value: Health: Near death

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_10
data.value: Health: Critically weakened

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_30
data.value: Health: Heavily injured

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_50
data.value: Health: Stable

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_70
data.value: Health: In top Shape

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_90
data.value: Health: Peak performance

data.name: UI_HealthLabel_na
data.value: Health: -1

data.name: UI_HealthTooltip_00
data.value: You're on the verge of death. Your body is slowly giving up.

data.name: UI_HealthTooltip_10
data.value: You're bleeding out and barely conscious. Every movement is pure agony.

data.name: UI_HealthTooltip_30
data.value: You have deep wounds and can barely stay on your feet.

data.name: UI_HealthTooltip_50
data.value: You've taken some hits, but you can still fight.

data.name: UI_HealthTooltip_70
data.value: You've taken some damage, but your wounds aren't affecting your performance.

data.name: UI_HealthTooltip_90
data.value: You're in top shape and ready for a fight.

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_00
data.value: Recovery:

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_10
data.value: Recovery: Low

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_30
data.value: Recovery: Sufficient

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_50
data.value: Recovery: High

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_70
data.value: Recovery: Optimal

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_90
data.value: Recovery: Optimal

data.name: UI_RecoveryLabel_na
data.value: Recovery: -1

data.name: UI_RecoveryTooltip_00
data.value: Your body is too stressed. Recovery is impossible.

data.name: UI_RecoveryTooltip_10
data.value: Recovery would be minimal. A rest period will provide little to no improvement.

data.name: UI_RecoveryTooltip_30
data.value: A rest period will barely help. It will take a long time to recover.

data.name: UI_RecoveryTooltip_50
data.value: A rest period would provide a noticeable benefit. Recovery is moderate.

data.name: UI_RecoveryTooltip_70
data.value: Your body is primed for a fast recovery. A rest period will work wonders.

data.name: UI_RecoveryTooltip_90
data.value: Every minute of rest results in maximum regeneration.

data.name: UI_Sleep_Message
data.value: You're in a deep sleep, but your mind is slowly clearing.

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_00
data.value: Sleep: Sleep Deprived

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_10
data.value: Sleep: Drowsy

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_30
data.value: Sleep: Tired

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_50
data.value: Sleep: Alert

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_70
data.value: Sleep: Rested

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_90
data.value: Sleep: Refreshed

data.name: UI_SleepLabel_na
data.value: Sleep: -1

data.name: UI_SleepTooltip_00
data.value: Your eyes burn, your head feels heavy. You keep falling into a comatose doze for a moment.

data.name: UI_SleepTooltip_10
data.value: Your eyes are burning and you can barely stay awake.

data.name: UI_SleepTooltip_30
data.value: Your body feels heavy and your mind is getting foggy.

data.name: UI_SleepTooltip_50
data.value: You urgently need a break to recover and regain your focus.

data.name: UI_SleepTooltip_70
data.value: You are wide awake and your body is recovered.

data.name: UI_SleepTooltip_90
data.value: You feel rested, ready, and full of energy.

data.name: UI_Suit_Hydrogen
data.value: Suit Hydrogen

data.name: UI_Suit_Oxygen
data.value: Suit Oxygen

data.name: UI_Suit_Power
data.value: Suit Power

data.name: UI_Tooltip_na
data.value: Error: Something went wrong

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_00
data.value: Water: Dehydrated

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_10
data.value: Water: Parched

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_30
data.value: Water: Thirsty

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_50
data.value: Water: Not thirsty

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_70
data.value: Water: Hydrated

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_90
data.value: Water: Optimally hydrated

data.name: UI_WaterLabel_na
data.value: Water: -1

data.name: UI_WaterTooltip_00
data.value: Your body has run out of fluids. Your mind is shutting down, and the end is near.

data.name: UI_WaterTooltip_10
data.value: Your throat is dry, and your tongue is sticking to the roof of your mouth. You're weak and can barely move.

data.name: UI_WaterTooltip_30
data.value: Your mouth feels like sandpaper, and you urgently need a drink. Your concentration is suffering.

data.name: UI_WaterTooltip_50
data.value: You're feeling a slight thirst. A drink would be good right now.

data.name: UI_WaterTooltip_70
data.value: You've had enough fluids to function normally.

data.name: UI_WaterTooltip_90
data.value: Your body feels fresh and full of energy. You're ready for any exertion.

data.name: Description_CubeBlock_InsetFarmPlotAdvanced
data.value: A highly developed farm plot that is built flush into floors or walls. It conceals the substrate and creates a clean, modern aesthetic in your base.

data.name: Description_VerticalFarmPlotAdvanced
data.value: An advanced farm plot specifically designed for vertical placement. It saves space and makes optimal use of ceiling height. A touch of aesthetics in daily survival.

data.name: DisplayName_CubeBlock_InsetFarmPlotAdvanced
data.value: Inset Farm Plot

data.name: DisplayName_VerticalFarmPlotAdvanced
data.value: Vertical Farm Plot

data.name: Item_LaysChips_Extra_Tooltip
data.value:
This snack tastes like home. It satisfies hunger, but also awakens a longing for better days.
Health: ~3% Food: ~15% Sleep: Makes you more tired Bloating: moderate

data.name: HUD_Sleep_Caption
data.value: Sleep

data.name: BlockPropertyProperties_CauseOfDeath_LowWater
data.value: Nutrient Depletion

data.name: DisplayName_Blueprint_FruitTea
data.value:
Fruit Tea
Water: ~20% Makes one tired Reduces bloating
